expectations.text: The plan explicitly identifies the workflow as serial or step-gated rather than parallel.
expectations.evidence: The response says it will first process acorn and only after that passes will it move to avia-base.

expectations.text: The response defines at least two child tasks or steps, including one for acorn and one for avia-base.
expectations.evidence: It describes step 2 as handling acorn and step 3 as handling avia-base.

expectations.text: The response states that the acorn step must pass `mvn install` before proceeding.
expectations.evidence: It explicitly says to run `mvn clean install` in acorn and only proceed when the current step passes.

expectations.text: The response says the main session should primarily define boundaries and read summaries instead of doing detailed local analysis.
expectations.evidence: It says the main thread will not spread out into reading acorn/avia-base code and will default to only reading child summaries unless failure occurs.
